note: Workflow rule actions (which functions/webhooks each rule calls) are not exposed by the Zoho Settings API. The list endpoint returns rule metadata only (trigger type, module, status, criteria) but NOT the actions array. To see actions, you must open each rule in the Zoho CRM UI at Setup > Automation > Workflow Rules. The actions for key rules are manually documented below based on their names and context.

TriggerPipeDreamIVR.likely_action: Calls a Pipedream webhook to trigger IVR. Sends Phone_Call record data. Trace ID stored in Pipedream_Trigger_Ivr_Trace_Id field.

TriggerRettelIVR.likely_action: Calls Retell AI to initiate an IVR phone call. Created 2025-09-03, replacing Pipedream IVR.

AI_Handle_Failed_Retry_Phone_Calls.likely_action: Calls an AI function or webhook when call Status changes to Failed/Busy.

S_Schedules_Daily_Clock_In_Call.likely_action: Creates a Phone_Call record or calls a function to initiate IVR clock-in call.

S_Schedules_Daily_Clock_Out_Call.likely_action: Creates a Phone_Call record or calls a function to initiate IVR clock-out call.
